title: Overflowing double multiplication leads to incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL);
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) * (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS result;
SELECT POWER((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1), 2) AS squared_value;
SELECT (CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) + (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1)) * (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS null_handling_result;
key_bug_features: Double multiplication overflow causes incorrect results
